acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh sources a dedicated finding validation helper.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: roadmap.sh now sources scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap-findings.sh using the same shellcheck source-comment pattern as the other roadmap helpers.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: validate_roadmap_findings remains the public function called by validate_roadmap_export.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_roadmap_findings is defined in roadmap-findings.sh, and validate_roadmap_export still invokes it without changing the public checker flow.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The moved checker still rejects malformed finding node ids, severity/status values, content fields, optional paths, lines, and timestamps.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Focused negative smoke logs cover unknown node_id, bad severity/status, malformed id/content, bad path, bad line, and bad timestamp cases.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: All qd report-check helper files remain below the configured line budget.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-check-modularize/line-count-check.log records roadmap.sh at 175 lines and roadmap-findings.sh at 173 lines.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-check-modularize/qd-reports-check.log records qd report validation passing with this node's completion report included.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, line-count evidence, and focused negative smokes for moved finding validation.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, line-count-check.log, and the focused negative smoke logs.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The completion report marks realWorldValidation not_required and limits the node to repository qd report-check modularization.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report-check modularization only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
